Vårbynätverket.description: Crime gang based in Vårby, Huddinge Municipality, Stockholm, active from the 2010s. Led by Chihab Lamouri, involved in drug trafficking, shootings, and kidnapping. Members were convicted in 2021 using EncroChat evidence.

descriptions: The Alfano clan split into two factions, with old affiliates against those loyal to Caiazzo, leading to a faida.
edges.evidence_quote: faida dei quartieri collinari Vomero-Arenella : ... lo storico clan capeggiato da Giovanni Alfano si scisse, formando due distinti schieramenti. Da un lato, gli affiliati di vecchia militanza al gruppo Alfano, dall'altro quelli rimasti fedeli al pluri-pregiudicato Antonio Caiazzo

Brighton razor gangs.description: Groups of razor-wielding youths involved in racketeering on local racecourses in Brighton, England, during the 1930s and 1940s. They were dominated by Charles Sabini's Clerkenwell-based organization, which included around 300 members and utilized political and legal connections. The gangs formed the background for Graham Greene's novel Brighton Rock.

descriptions: Gente Nueva attacked Los Muertos, a rival gang allied with Juárez Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: the gunmen were plotting to kill members of Los Muertos , a rival gang at the service of the Juárez Cartel

descriptions: Juárez Cartel used Los Muertos as allies to fight Sinaloa Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: El Cártel de Juárez usó a Barrio Azteca y Los Muertos para luchar contra las fuerzas del Cártel de Sinaloa

'Ndrina Codispoti.description: The Codispoti are a 'ndrina (organized crime clan) of the 'Ndrangheta based in San Luca, Calabria, Italy. They are allied with the Nirta-Scalzone, Romeo, Libri, and De Stefano families. They have been involved in drug trafficking from South America to Italy and other European countries, and have served as mediators in the Reggio Calabria mafia war. The clan is considered a reference point for the 'Ndrangheta in Rome.

descriptions: Codispoti are allies with De Stefano.
edges.evidence_quote: e anche con i Libri e De Stefano di Reggio Calabria

descriptions: Codispoti acted as mediators on behalf of De Stefano in the mafia war.
edges.evidence_quote: Furono da mediatori dalla parte dei De Stefano nella guerra di mafia di Reggio Calabria

descriptions: Codispoti are allies with Libri and De Stefano.
edges.evidence_quote: e anche con i Libri e De Stefano di Reggio Calabria

descriptions: Morabito asked Codispoti for support for their illicit affairs.
edges.evidence_quote: La cosca dei Morabito di Africo chiese appoggio per i propri affari illeciti.

descriptions: Codispoti are allies of Nirta-Scalzone, with familial ties.
edges.evidence_quote: Sono alleati dei Nirta-Scalzone (con cui hanno anche dei legami parentali)

descriptions: Codispoti are allies of Romeo.
edges.evidence_quote: Sono alleati dei Nirta-Scalzone (con cui hanno anche dei legami parentali), i Romeo

descriptions: La Maggiore is allied with the Codispoti and has familial ties.
edges.evidence_quote: Sono alleati dei Codispoti (con cui hanno dei legami parentali)

El Monte Flores.description: Mexican-American criminal street gang based in El Monte, California, founded in the 1940s or 1950s. It is the largest Hispanic gang in San Gabriel Valley and one of the oldest in Los Angeles County. The gang is involved in drug trafficking, robbery, murder, and other crimes, with thousands of active members. It is a Sureño gang allied with the Mexican Mafia.

descriptions: Azusa 13 is listed as a rival of El Monte Flores.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Bassett Grande and NS/ES Bolen, Lomas, Sangra, Azusa 13

descriptions: Bassett Grande is listed as a rival of El Monte Flores.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Bassett Grande and NS/ES Bolen, Lomas, Sangra, Azusa 13

descriptions: Lomas is listed as a rival of El Monte Flores.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Bassett Grande and NS/ES Bolen, Lomas, Sangra, Azusa 13

descriptions: El Monte Flores, as Sureños, are controlled by the Mexican Mafia in prison.
edges.evidence_quote: Like all Sureños once they are in the prison system they set aside their rivalry and unite under the Sureño Banner and are controlled by La eMe.

descriptions: NS/ES Bolen is listed as a rival of El Monte Flores.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Bassett Grande and NS/ES Bolen, Lomas, Sangra, Azusa 13

descriptions: Sangra is listed as a rival of El Monte Flores.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Bassett Grande and NS/ES Bolen, Lomas, Sangra, Azusa 13

Young Boys Inc..description: Young Boys Inc. was a major African American drug organization based in Detroit, Michigan, founded in 1976 by Dwayne Davis, Bernard Boykins, Reginald Chestnut, and Charles Lindsey. It pioneered inner-city street-corner heroin sales using minors as couriers to avoid severe penalties. The group expanded to other cities like Boston and controlled up to 80% of Detroit's heroin trade until its leadership was indicted and convicted in 1982.

descriptions: Harakat Khilafat Baluch joined ISIS–K.
edges.evidence_quote: Notable among these are the Omar Ghazi Group, Shamali Khilafat, Gansu Hui Group, Harakat Khilafat Baluch, Jaysh ul Islam, Mullah Bakhtwar's group, the Shamsatoo group, and radical student groups in Pakistan and eastern Afghanistan.

Bonnot Gang.description: French anarchist group active in France and Belgium from 1911 to 1912. Composed of illegalist anarchists, they pioneered motorized robberies and bank raids using cars and repeating rifles. Led by Jules Bonnot, the gang engaged in a series of high-profile crimes before being dismantled by police.

descriptions: The Gang des Tractions Avant derived its methods from the Bonnot Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: Its methods were largely derived from those of the Bonnot Gang

Tri-City Skins.description: Ontario-based white power group active from 1997 to 2012 in the Kitchener-Waterloo and Cambridge area. James Scott Richardson was its most visible member. The group engaged in intimidation, assault, vandalism, and property crimes, with some members arrested for weapons and drug trafficking.

descriptions: Canadian Lancers merged into the new Satan's Choice in 1965.
edges.evidence_quote: a 1965 alliance of four regional motorcycle clubs: the Phantom Riders of Oshawa, the Canadian Lancers of Scarborough, the Throttle Twisters of Preston, and the Wild Ones of Port Credit.

descriptions: Sorianiello is a Camorra group involved in conflict with Nigerian individuals.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 26 aprile 2021 sono stati arrestati 5 soggetti ritenuti appartenenti al gruppo camorristico "Sorianiello"

descriptions: Tortilla Flats is listed as a rival of Tree Top Piru.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Tortilla Flats, Most Compton Crips

descriptions: Four Corner Hustlers are rivals of Black Souls.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Folk Nation , Gangster Disciples , Black Souls , New Breed Black Gangsters , Mafia Insane Vice Lords , Angelo Four Corner Hustlers

descriptions: Dollar Kids is a smaller unit within The Americans.
edges.evidence_quote: The Americans gang is made up of smaller units such as the Ugly Americans, Young Americans, Spoilt Brats, Dollar Boys, Dollar Kids, Young Dixie Boys and Sexy Boys.

descriptions: La Barra Del Rojo had major confrontations with Los Borrachos del Tablón.
edges.evidence_quote: it also had major confrontations with the barras bravas of Boca Juniors (La 12), River Plate ( Los Borrachos del Tablón ) and San Lorenzo de Almagro (La Gloriosa), also rivals of the club.

descriptions: Atomwaffen and Black Order cooperated to form a border patrol militia.
edges.evidence_quote: Atomwaffen and Finnish lodge of the Black Order also formed a border patrol militia in co-operation, recruiting former military police.

ShadowCrew.description: ShadowCrew was a cybercrime forum operating from 2002 to 2004, founded by Brett Johnson, Seth Sanders, and Kim Marvin Taylor. It facilitated credit card fraud, hacking, and other illegal activities, with around 4,000 members. The site was infiltrated by the US Secret Service through informant Albert Gonzalez, leading to its shutdown.

descriptions: ShadowCrew admin Brett Johnson was embedded as admin on CardersMarket.
edges.evidence_quote: Operation Anglerphish' embedded him ... as admins on both ScandinavianCarding and CardersMarket.

descriptions: ShadowCrew emerged from Counterfeit Library.
edges.evidence_quote: ShadowCrew emerged early in 2002 from another underground site, counterfeitlibrary.com , which was run by Brett Johnson

descriptions: ShadowCrew admin Brett Johnson was embedded as admin on ScandinavianCarding.
edges.evidence_quote: Operation Anglerphish' embedded him ... as admins on both ScandinavianCarding and CardersMarket.

Los Paisas.description: Colombian criminal and narcoparamilitary organization based in Medellín, formed in 2008 from remnants of paramilitary groups demobilized during peace talks (2004-2006). It was founded by former members of the Oficina de Envigado after the extradition of Don Berna. The group engaged in drug trafficking, extortion, kidnapping, and murder. It was dissolved by Colombian security forces in 2014, with remaining members joining the Clan Úsuga.

descriptions: Los Paisas is listed as a dominant paramilitary group alongside AUC successor groups.
edges.evidence_quote: In the early 2010s, the Black Eagles, Los Rastrojos, Los Urabeños, Los Paisas, Los Machos, Renacer, Los Gaitanistas, Nueva Generación, Bloque Meta, Libertadores del Vichada, the ERPAC, and The Office of Envigado comprised the dominant criminal and paramilitary organizations.

descriptions: Los Paisas was founded by a former AUC member.
edges.evidence_quote: Luis Fernando era señalado por múltiples delitos, entre ellos, en la participación y posterior fundación de la bacrim Los Paisas , en complicidad con otros individuos.

descriptions: Clan del Golfo's predecessor fought against Los Paisas.
edges.evidence_quote: Los hombres de Daniel Rendón comenzaron una lucha contra Los Paisas

descriptions: Clan Úsuga recruited former members of Los Paisas.
edges.evidence_quote: situación aprovechada por el 'Clan Úsuga', que ha reclutado a exmiembros de los Rastrojos y Los Paisas para aumentar su pie de fuerza

descriptions: Clan del Golfo and Los Paisas held a meeting in 2012 to agree on territory division and future alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: representantes del Clan Úsuga, al igual que de los desaparecidos Rastrojos y Paisas, habrían sostenido una reunión clandestina en 2012 en Medellín , para acordar una repartición de 'territorios' a nivel nacional y así acabar con los enfrentamientos entre las mismas organizaciones criminales y comenzar a trabajar en conjunto para una futura alianza.

descriptions: Factions of Los Paisas have strategically allied with Clan del Golfo.
edges.evidence_quote: varias facciones de otros grupos narcoparamilitares se les han aliado estratégicamente, debido al debilitamiento territorial y militar de organizaciones como ... Los Paisas

descriptions: Both operate in the same drug trafficking arena.
edges.evidence_quote: Comparte el escenario del narcotráfico con otras bandas narcoterroristas , entre las que se encuentran ... Los Paisas

descriptions: They jointly retained control of the area.
edges.evidence_quote: el Clan Úsuga retuvo el control de la zona, junto con la bacrim de Los Paisas

descriptions: Clan del Golfo met with Los Paisas and Los Rastrojos in 2012 to agree on territory division and end conflicts.
edges.evidence_quote: representantes del Clan Úsuga, al igual que de los desaparecidos Rastrojos y Paisas, habrían sostenido una reunión clandestina en 2012 en la ciudad de Medellín , para acordar una repartición de "territorios" a nivel nacional y así acabar con los enfrentamientos

descriptions: Survivors of Los Paisas joined Los Caparrapos.
edges.evidence_quote: Los Paisas fueron abatidos y detenidos por la Fuerza Pública, y los sobrevivientes se unieron a Los Caparrapos.

descriptions: Los Paisas considered Clan del Golfo as enemies according to infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: Gobierno de Colombia , Clan del Golfo , Oficina de Envigado

descriptions: Los Paisas aimed to destroy Clan del Golfo.
edges.evidence_quote: los Paisas habían puesto sus ojos en la destrucción del Clan Úsuga a toda costa

descriptions: Los Paisas were a franchise of Los Urabeños.
edges.evidence_quote: Los Paisas, una franquicia del entonces llamado Los Urabeños.

descriptions: Remnants of Los Paisas joined Clan del Golfo after its dissolution.
edges.evidence_quote: los miembros que han escapado de las autoridades formaron a ser parte del Clan Úsuga , conocido también como Clan del Golfo .

descriptions: Los Paisas had Los Rastrojos as allies according to infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: Los Rastrojos

descriptions: Los Paisas, Clan del Golfo, and Los Rastrojos held a meeting to agree on territory division and future alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: representantes de Los Paisas , junto a los líderes del Clan Úsuga y Los Rastrojos , habrían sostenido una reunión clandestina en la ciudad de Medellín, con el fin de acordar una repartición de "territorios" ... para acabar con los enfrentamientos entre las mismas organizaciones criminales y comenzar a trabajar en conjunto para una futura alianza.

descriptions: Authorities point to agreements between Los Paisas and Los Zetas.
edges.evidence_quote: las autoridades apuntan a acuerdos con el cartel mexicano de Los Zetas .

descriptions: Los Paisas considered Oficina de Envigado as enemies according to infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: Gobierno de Colombia , Clan del Golfo , Oficina de Envigado

descriptions: Los Paisas formed as a splinter from the rural militias of Oficina de Envigado.
edges.evidence_quote: las milicias rurales de la Oficina se separaron de la organización para conformar el grupo criminal conocido como "Los Paisas".

descriptions: Los Paisas may have reached agreements with FARC fronts.
edges.evidence_quote: pudieron haber llegado a acuerdos con otros grupos al margen de la ley como algunos frentes de las Fuerzas Armadas Revolucionarias de Colombia (FARC).

descriptions: Los Rastrojos were allied with Los Paisas (now dismantled).
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: Los Paisas (desarticulado)

descriptions: Los Rastrojos and Los Paisas met to negotiate territory division and form an alliance, but it did not materialize.
edges.evidence_quote: representantes de Los Rastrojos , junto a los líderes del Clan del Golfo y los desaparecidos Paisas , sostuvieron una reunión clandestina en la ciudad de Medellín , para acordar una repartición de "territorios" a nivel nacional; de esta manera, buscaban acabar los enfrentamientos entre las mismas organizaciones criminales y trabajar en conjunto para una alianza que al final no se dio.

descriptions: Los Paisas formed from rural militias that split from Oficina de Envigado.
edges.evidence_quote: las milicias rurales de La Oficina se separaran de la organización, formando posteriormente la banda criminal conocida como 'Los Paisas'

descriptions: El Tren de Aragua asesinó a un cabecilla de Los Paisas, iniciando una guerra.
edges.evidence_quote: sicarios del Tren de Aragua acribillan a Starly Torres Murzzi, señalado de ser cabecilla de la banda delincuencial ‘Los Paisas’

descriptions: The Treviño family, founders of the Cártel del Noreste, were associated with Los Texas.
edges.evidence_quote: Anteriormente, la familia Treviño Morales... tenían relación con una pandilla que controlaba la ciudad de Nuevo Laredo llamada Los Texas .

descriptions: The Cártel del Golfo absorbed Los Texas in 2001.
edges.evidence_quote: En 2001, el Cártel del Golfo absorbió a Los Texas

descriptions: Los Texas was absorbed by the Gulf Cartel in 2001.
edges.evidence_quote: The family had a relationship with the gang Los Texas (later absorbed by the Gulf Cartel in 2001), which controlled the city of Nuevo Laredo.

descriptions: Siru is a splinter faction from GAS Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: some GAS Gang members from Somerleyton Estate now referring to themselves as GAS Siru or Siru.

descriptions: Venice 13 and Santa Monica 17th St were rivals but later formed an alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: Venice 13's main rivals were the Santa Monica 13 and Santa Monica 17th St gangs, however they both settled a truce and formed an alliance.

Loyal to Familia.description: Loyal to Familia is a Danish street gang established in Nørrebro, Copenhagen in 2013. It engaged in drug trafficking and had a membership of 225 in 2017. The gang was ordered dissolved by the Danish Supreme Court on September 1, 2021, for lacking a legal purpose, marking the first such ruling since 1924.

descriptions: AK81 lists Loyal to Familia as a rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Immigrant gangs (especially the gang from Blågårdsplads): Black Cobra , Black Scorpions, Loyal to Familia , Black Jackets

descriptions: Bandidos and LTF were in a conflict in 2015.
edges.evidence_quote: An attack on a man in the Vapnagård housing estate in Helsingør on 30 June 2015 was linked to a conflict between the Bandidos and the immigrant gang LTF.

descriptions: Hells Angels and LTF were in a war over cannabis trade monopoly.
edges.evidence_quote: The Hells Angels became involved in a war with the Loyal to Familia (LTF) gang to monopolize the cannabis trade in Christiania.

descriptions: ISPP is an official affiliate of IS.
edges.evidence_quote: Islamic State – Philippines Province (ISPP) operates in the Philippines, primarily in Mindanao. It emerged in 2016 from local jihadist groups Maute Group, Bangsamoro Islamic Freedom Fighters (BIFF), and Ansar Khalifa Philippines (AKP).

descriptions: ISPP emerged from AKP.
edges.evidence_quote: It emerged in 2016 from local jihadist groups Maute Group, Bangsamoro Islamic Freedom Fighters (BIFF), and Ansar Khalifa Philippines (AKP).

descriptions: ISPP emerged from BIFF.
edges.evidence_quote: It emerged in 2016 from local jihadist groups Maute Group, Bangsamoro Islamic Freedom Fighters (BIFF), and Ansar Khalifa Philippines (AKP).

descriptions: ISPP emerged from Maute Group.
edges.evidence_quote: It emerged in 2016 from local jihadist groups Maute Group, Bangsamoro Islamic Freedom Fighters (BIFF), and Ansar Khalifa Philippines (AKP).

descriptions: D-Block Boys are allied with Fischer Fools.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Fischer Fools

descriptions: Guang Ji was created by an associate of Wah Kee's founder, indicating a cooperative origin.
edges.evidence_quote: His associate Zhào Guǎnghéng (赵广恒) created Guǎng Jì (广记) in Guangzhou , China

descriptions: Leisure family emerged from remnants of the Cuckoo Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: Two rival Lebanese crime families, the Michaels family and the Leisure family, emerged in St. Louis, Missouri from the remnants of the Cuckoo Gang, a bootlegging and gambling outfit which operated during the Prohibition era.

descriptions: Leisure family was affiliated with and under control of the Italian-American St. Louis crime family.
edges.evidence_quote: The Syrian-Lebanese crime families in St. Louis were affiliated with and under the control of the Italian-American St. Louis crime family headed by Anthony Giordano.

descriptions: Michaels and Leisure families engaged in open warfare after Giordano's death.
edges.evidence_quote: After Giordano's death from cancer on August 29, 1980, the Michaels and Leisure families entered into open warfare with one another.

Gremium Motorcycle Club.description: German outlaw motorcycle club founded in 1972 in Mannheim. Claims to be the largest German MC since 1999, with chapters across Europe and a prospect chapter in Thailand. The club was banned in 1988 but the ban was lifted in 1992. Associated with organized crime including human trafficking, drug and weapons trafficking.

descriptions: Infobox lists Gremium as rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Black Cobra, Comanchero MC, Cossacks MC, Finks MC, Gremium MC, Gypsy Joker MC, Kinfolk MC, Mongols MC, No Surrender MC, Notorious MC, Rebels MC, Red Devils MC, Rock Machine MC, Satudarah MC, Vagos MC

descriptions: Bandidos and Gremium were in a turf war starting in 2017.
edges.evidence_quote: The Bandidos have also been involved in a turf war with Gremium in North Zealand after Gremium opened a chapter in the traditional Bandidos stronghold of Helsinge on 3 February 2017 by patching-over the Local BrotherHood (LBH) gang.

descriptions: Bad 7 MC is a support club for Gremium.
edges.evidence_quote: several associate chapters (Bad 7 MC support club) in Germany

descriptions: Gremium became the largest German MC after Bones MC chapters patched over to Hells Angels.
edges.evidence_quote: Gremium claims to be the largest German motorcycle club since the patchover of the also formerly Mannheim-based German chapters of the Bones MC to the Hells Angels MC in 1999

descriptions: Gremium absorbed Local BrotherHood by patching them over.
edges.evidence_quote: Gremium opened a chapter in the traditional Bandidos stronghold of Helsinge on 3 February 2017 by patching-over the Local BrotherHood (LBH) gang.

descriptions: Rock Machine allied with Gremium MC during European expansion.
edges.evidence_quote: During the club's expansion into Europe, it made an alliance with Gremium MC, one of the largest motorcycle clubs in Germany.

descriptions: X-Team member attacked a Gremium MC member, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: On 28 April 2012, an X-Team member used his car to force a member of the Gremium Motorcycle Club off the road near Westerkappeln.

descriptions: Al-Rahman Legion is listed as an opponent in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: ... Al-Rahman Legion

descriptions: Ahrar al-Sham had conflict with al-Rahman Legion leading to defections, then a ceasefire.
edges.evidence_quote: On 6 August 2017, 120 Ahrar al-Sham fighters in Arbin, Eastern Ghouta defected to the al-Rahman Legion after internal disputes. Ahrar al-Sham accused the Rahman Legion of seizing their weapons, while the Rahman Legion accused Ahrar al-Sham of their attempt to implement their 'failed' experience from northern Syria in eastern Ghouta. A ceasefire agreement between the Rahman Legion and Ahrar al-Sham was implemented on 9 August.
